title: Pico 8 Pack
description: Minecraft but all colors have been replaced with that of the Pico 8 System
body:
# **1.21.7/1.21.8 OUT NOW!**
Minecraft but if it was made on the Pico 8!

**Includes!**
- All Blocks
- All Items
- All Entities
- All Menus
- A Custom Panorama

**WARNING:** This was made using Libresprite's feature that allows you to replace all colors on a texture with a certain color palette. None of these textures were created by me.

![A Trial Chamber with the Pico 8 Pack logo in the top right corner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/039a597e0e996a97df07f492cf01d294b4fa01d8.png)
